fields.label: Desktop Hero Image
fields.name: hero_image
fields.instructions: Landscape image for viewports 1200px and wider.

fields.label: Tablet Hero Image
fields.name: hero_image_tablet
fields.instructions: Image for viewports 768px–1199px. Falls back to desktop if empty.

fields.label: Mobile Hero Image
fields.name: hero_image_mobile
fields.instructions: Portrait image for viewports below 768px. Falls back to tablet, then desktop.

هر سفارش از اولین طرح تا آخرین پرداخت، برای یک نفر و تنها یک نفر ساخته می‌شود.
